news.title:

Advanced techniques like CSS and fishbone drilling drive efficiency, reducing import reliance.

This milestone comes amid geopolitical tensions in the Gulf region.

news.title:
Analysts recommend Premier Energies, ONGC, Oil India, Newgen Software, and Cello World for growth sectors.
Target prices: Premier Energies Rs 1000, ONGC Rs 320, Oil India Rs 525, Newgen Rs 540, Cello Rs 500.

news.title:
Systematix flags a bearish Nifty trend in April, with 21,700-22,000 as critical support. Pharma emerges as a standout sector.
Bullish stocks include Astral, Aurobindo Pharma, Sun Pharma, Glenmark, Nalco, and Oil India. ICICI Prudential Life and BEL show bearish setups.
news.summary:
Systematix flags a bearish Nifty trend in April, with 21,700-22,000 as critical support. Pharma emerges as a standout sector.
Bullish stocks include Astral, Aurobindo Pharma, Sun Pharma, Glenmark, Nalco, and Oil India. ICICI Prudential Life and BEL show bearish setups.

news.title:
Govt raises regulated gas price to $7/mmBtu, boosting ONGC & Oil India's revenues.
Higher gas prices may increase costs for CNG, PNG, and fertiliser sectors amid global energy volatility.
news.summary:

The collaboration targets critical minerals used in advanced industries.

news.title:
Ambit downgrades IOC, BPCL, HPCL targets by up to 57%, citing risks from elevated oil prices, rupee depreciation, and insufficient government relief.
Ambit maintains Buy on RIL, ONGC, Oil India, and city gas distributors like GAIL; sees upstream oil and RIL as key winners amid high crude prices.
news.summary:
Ambit downgrades IOC, BPCL, HPCL targets by up to 57%, citing risks from elevated oil prices, rupee depreciation, and insufficient government relief.
Ambit maintains Buy on RIL, ONGC, Oil India, and city gas distributors like GAIL; sees upstream oil and RIL as key winners amid high crude prices.

news.title:
CLSA notes Middle East war impacts stocks like ONGC, Oil India, Reliance, and OMCs differently.
Post-war, upstream firms like ONGC may gain, while OMCs face margin pressure if crude stays elevated.
news.summary:
CLSA notes Middle East war impacts stocks like ONGC, Oil India, Reliance, and OMCs differently.
Post-war, upstream firms like ONGC may gain, while OMCs face margin pressure if crude stays elevated.

news.title:
Oil marketing stocks HPCL, BPCL, and Indian Oil plunged 25-30% due to the US-Iran war, with valuations below 5-year averages.
Gas stocks like Petronet LNG, GAIL, IGL, MGL, and Gujarat Gas dropped 11-27%, while ONGC and Oil India fell 3-4% but stayed above 5-year averages.
news.summary:
Oil marketing stocks HPCL, BPCL, and Indian Oil plunged 25-30% due to the US-Iran war, with valuations below 5-year averages.
Gas stocks like Petronet LNG, GAIL, IGL, MGL, and Gujarat Gas dropped 11-27%, while ONGC and Oil India fell 3-4% but stayed above 5-year averages.

news.title:
Morgan Stanley upgrades Oil India to Overweight, raises TP to Rs 563 citing Qatar LNG disruptions.
Higher oil/coal demand benefits upstream players, while GAIL & Petronet LNG face downgrades due to weak gas demand.
news.summary:

news.title:
Geopolitical tensions, like the Iran-Israel conflict, boost Indian defence (HAL, BEL, BDL) and energy stocks (ONGC, Oil India).

news.title:
Sensex dropped 1,236 pts to 82,498; Nifty fell 365 pts below 25,500, erasing ₹7L cr in market cap.
